data.title: A Ib/IIa Randomized, Placebo Controlled, Intranasal Administration Study on Safety, Tolerability and Potential Efficacy of AD17002 in Subjects With House Dust Mite (HDM) Allergic Rhinitis
data.brief_summary: A single center, double-blind, randomized, dose-escalation study to assess the safety, tolerability and efficacy of 3 doses of AD17002 in comparison to placebo. Subjects will be randomized at 3:1 ratios in each of 3 cohorts to receive AD17002 or placebo.
data.eligibility_criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

A subject can participate in the study only if all the following criteria are met:

1. Subject 20-49 aged years, having a clinical history of allergic rhinitis (diagnosed by a physician) of 1 year duration or more and have received anti-allergy treatment during the previous year
endpoints: Safety and tolerance of AD17002 treatments in patients with HDM allergy as measured by incidence of adverse events
